title: Arkadiusz Paterek
text: Home * People * Arkadiusz Paterek Arkadiusz Paterek [1] Arkadiusz Paterek , a Polish computer and data scientist with interests in programming , machine learning , recommender system and deep learning [2] , and chess player [3] . He holds a masters degree from University of Warsaw , with a thesis entitled Modeling of an evaluation function in chess [4] , elaborating on the single-layer perceptron design of an evaluation function . Inspired by Michael Buro's GLEM approach [5] in the domain of Othello , Arkadiusz Paterek used his own chess program Gosu , to tune its evaluation by logistic regression .
